retry_reason: Not a wrapper — refcount operations are not the primary purpose.

judge.reason: The primary purpose is to allocate an skb, DMA-map it, and post it to the CE ring for RX. The refcount operation (skb allocation and potential free) is incidental to the main buffer submission logic. The function does not acquire, release, or set a reference on an existing object; it creates a new skb and transfers ownership to the CE layer.
